O Dreamcore é como estar preso dentro de um sonho que você não lembra direito. É familiar, mas estranho. Bonito, mas meio triste. São lugares vazios, sons distantes, luzes suaves — tudo parece real, mas algo não encaixa. É a sensação de nostalgia por algo que talvez nunca existiu. O Dreamcore não mostra o medo… ele faz você senti-lo, devagar, como se o tempo tivesse parado e o mundo virasse apenas uma lembrança distorcida.

Corecore is a unique trend that appeared on TikTok and quickly caught people’s attention. Unlike many other TikTok trends that focus on dancing, comedy, or challenges, corecore is more about commentary on internet culture itself. It usually combines random clips, memes, advertisements, and viral moments into a single video to show how chaotic and overwhelming the internet can feel. Many people see it as both a joke and a critique of modern social media.

Weirdcore is an internet aesthetic that emerged in the early 2020s, characterized by its surreal, nostalgic, and often unsettling vibe. It draws inspiration from early internet imagery, low-quality graphics, and dreamlike or liminal spaces, creating a sense of familiarity mixed with unease. The aesthetic often features distorted or glitchy visuals, cryptic text, and mundane yet eerie scenes, such as empty hallways, abandoned playgrounds, or poorly edited photos with strange filters.
